s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: The Forbidden Files / Bottom Line Insider Network: Years ago, I started inviting some of my business associates to private lunches, where we'd swap our most valuable insider information. The secrets could be about anything. We had only one rule. Each secret had to be easy, legal, ethical and wonderfully profitable to our wealth, health or happiness. There were just a handful of us at the start, but the concept soon took on a life of its own. Because we all became very successful, and as word spread, others wanted in. As over 437 legendary industry insiders joined our ranks, our 'luncheon club' became a powerful network.

specimens.quote: Wall Street insider William O'Neil's secret technique netted a mind-boggling return of 705% from 1998 to 2003. If you followed it, you'd be 7 times wealthier. Investors who stuck with 'safe' index funds during this same 6-year period earned a grand total of 14.6%. That's nearly 50 times worse.

This is not 'alternative medicine'! It's mainstream as mainstream can be. The discoverer of this sensational secret is a highly esteemed medical professor at the University of California at Los Angeles. The facts are buried away in a scholarly journal that consumers are never likely to read.
Recent research from top academic sources shows it's 50% more successful than outdated angioplasty. Stunned experts admit it clears 'hopelessly' blocked arteries in as little as 30 minutes.
Even when chemotherapy, radiation and surgery fail. This astonishing alternative dissolves tumors without harming healthy tissue. And a famed oncologist confirms it works in as little as one hour.

I thought to myself, these guys are a bunch of phonies. Well, I wanted to prove just how phony you were, so I subscribed... The rug layer was due at 8 AM and came at noon. I charged them for the hours I wasted, and they paid me immediately. In another article, you stated that a person has a right to argue with their medical insurers if they refuse to pay. Again, you were right! I have saved enough money to subscribe to your wonderful magazine for some time to come. - Belen Alexander Williams, Phoenix, AZ
I lost 55 pounds in 6 months on your diet tips! - Bruce Watnem, Humboldt, IA
Botanical breakthrough now shown to reduce hypertension dramatically. Better still, it seems to relax rigid artery walls permanently. Take for just 8 weeks and you may never need it again.
Nature's instant cholesterol-cutter blows away drugs, herbs and the Mediterranean diet! Proven to drop your cholesterol by 100 points or more in under 2 weeks.

One of today's most brilliant tax attorneys unearthed this 'little' IRS blunder that could triple or even quintuple your savings. If every American claimed what they're entitled to, the IRS would have to give back at least a trillion dollars.
Esteemed attorney William Bronchik, Esq.: 'It requires virtually no capital and the profits can be instantaneous.' Turn your lunch money into $10,000 instantly, day after day.
As The Washington Post wrote, some of these natural fixes 'do work.'

Drug commercials that lie. Contrary to common belief, drug ads are NOT preapproved by the FDA! Generic drug 'equivalents' that could kill. Some generics are very different than the name brands and can lead to life-threatening blood clots or hemorrhages. But there's a secret rating system that tells insiders which ones are safe.
